items.title: Washington najavio povlačenje dijela snaga iz NATO-a, saveznici zabrinuti
items.summary: WASHINGTON je obavijestio saveznike da će postupno smanjiti vojne kapacitete namijenjene NATO-u, vršeći pritisak na Europu da preuzme veću odgovornost za vlastitu obranu. Detalji još nisu poznati.

items.title: Trump vraća Pam Bondi nekoliko tjedana nakon što ju je smijenio
items.summary: BIVŠA državna odvjetnica Pam Bondi vraća se u Trumpovu administraciju kao savjetnica u Vijeću za znanost i tehnologiju, nakon što se u tajnosti borila s rakom štitnjače i oporavila.

items.title: Rekordni toplinski val pogađa Europu, znanstvenici zapanjeni
items.summary: ZAPADNU Europu pogodio je nezapamćen toplinski val koji ruši stotine temperaturnih rekorda. Znanstvenici upozoravaju da klimatske promjene pojačavaju ovakve ekstreme, koji stižu ranije nego se očekivalo.

items.title: Sirija: Otkrili smo ostatke programa kemijskog oružja Assadova režima
items.summary: SIRIJA: Vlasti su otkrile ostatke Assadovog programa kemijskog oružja, uključujući streljivo iz napada i uhitile 18 povezanih osoba.

items.title: Israel ‘intensifies’ attacks in Lebanon killing at least 31 people
items.summary: At least 31 people have been killed in Israeli attacks across southern Lebanon.

items.title: Epidemija ospica u Bangladešu. Stotine djece umrlo zbog nestašice cjepiva
items.summary: U BANGLADEŠU je od ožujka od ospica umrlo preko 500 djece. Epidemiju su pogoršali nestašica cjepiva, preopterećene bolnice i kašnjenje u nabavi uzrokovano političkim previranjima.

items.title: Puknuo spremnik s 300.000 litara tekućine u tvornici u SAD-u. Ima mrtvih
items.summary: U TVORNICI u SAD-u puknuo je spremnik s 300.000 litara tekućine, usmrtivši više osoba i ozlijedivši desetke, uključujući vatrogasca.

items.title: Netanyahu: Izveli smo napad na novog vojnog zapovjednika Hamasa
items.summary: IZRAEL je napao Mohammeda Odeha, novog vojnog zapovjednika Hamasa i "arhitekta masakra 7. listopada", obećavajući nastavak potjere.

items.title: Američka vojska: Jedna osoba ubijena u napadu na brod za krijumčarenje droge
items.summary: AMERIČKA vojska priopćila je da je napala brod koji je navodno sudjelovao u operacijama krijumčarenja droge u istočnom Pacifiku te da je pritom ubijena jedna osoba.

items.title: White House prepares for UFC showdown for Trump’s 80th birthday
items.summary: Construction is underway on the South Lawn of the White House in preparation for UFC Freedom 250.

items.title: Dozens killed in Lebanon as Israel intensifies strikes
items.summary: Israel says it struck 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon, after PM Benjamin Netanyahu vows to "crush" the Iran-backed group.

items.title: Attorney General Ken Paxton routs  veteran incumbent Cornyn in Texas Senate primary
items.summary: The race will help determine whether Democrats can win back control of the US Senate for the last half of the Trump presidency.

items.title: Trump-backed Paxton topples Senator Cornyn in Texas primary run-off
items.summary: Ken Paxton defeats John Cornyn in Texas race, setting up a November election that could decide control of US Senate.

items.title: One killed and others missing after chemical explosion at US paper mill
items.summary: Nine others were injured and another nine are missing after a tank ruptured at a paper mill in Longview, Washington.

items.title: Group of women and children with alleged ISIL ties returns to Australia
items.summary: Australian Federal Police have not made any arrests but say inquiries are ongoing.

items.title: Hundreds of children die within months as measles cases soar in Bangladesh
items.summary: The country has recorded more than 60,000 suspected cases of measles in just over two months.

items.title: Brazil’s Flavio Bolsonaro meets with Trump amid troubled presidential bid
items.summary: Son of former President Jair Bolsonaro is fighting to recover from a scandal that has rocked his presidential campaign.

items.title: How decision-making happens in Iran
items.summary: Iran’s negotiators follow a mandate set by the Supreme National Security Council and approved by the Supreme Leader.

items.title: White House erects UFC cage ahead of US 250th anniversary celebrations
items.summary: Workers were seen assembling domed arches and a staging area on the South Lawn in preparation for next month's event.

items.title: UN chief ‘deeply concerned’ by Moscow plan for Kyiv strikes
items.summary: UN Secretary-General Guterres said he was “deeply concerned” after Russia announced plans to strike Ukraine.
